geocode.source: Richmond: St. Johns Avenue - Bay Street

original_title: Richmond: St. Johns Avenue - Bay Street
text:
(1)
St. Johns Avenue, north side, west from Bay Street.
February 25, 1931
P. L. Sperr

(2)
The north side of St. Johns Avenue, looking east toward Bay Street from Anderson Street. View 2 shows the same section of the thoroughfare as view 1.
February 2, 1931
P. L. Sperr
